gist.headline: New friend in the hive: Luna
gist.blurb: Say hello to Luna, a new Chinese AI companion with an ENFJ personality and deep Pollinations integration. She's got a memory system and taps into dozens of our text and image models to keep the conversation lively!
gist.summary: Added Luna, a self-hosted Chinese AI companion with memory and multi-model support, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Luna in the apps directory, showcasing a deep integration of Pollinations' text and image models.
gist.visual_concept: Luna means moon, and it's a Chinese AI companion. Depict Polly the bee making friends with a glowing moon-themed AI character or hologram in a cozy setting with subtle Chinese motifs like a paper lantern. Represents community, friendship, and the new app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot having tea with a friendly glowing moon-shaped hologram character. A lime green (#ecf874) paper lantern hangs above them in a serene digital garden. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
